description_long: This skateboard features a standard double-kick deck with a dark, grippy surface on top and a detailed, monochrome graphic of a stylized skull with swirling patterns on the underside. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, with a slightly concave shape for better control. The trucks are metallic and mounted in a standard configuration, supporting four black, classic-style street wheels. The grip tape on the top is mostly solid black, with a partial cut-out revealing the skull graphic near the tail. The overall color palette is dominated by black, gray, and hints of blue, giving the skateboard a modern, urban aesthetic. No visible brand logos are present, but the deck artwork is distinctive and eye-catching.
description: A modern skateboard with a black grip-taped deck, detailed skull artwork underneath, metallic trucks, and black street wheels. The design is urban and visually striking, with a mix of dark tones and intricate graphics.
description_view_0: This view shows both the top and bottom of the skateboard, highlighting the black grip tape and the full skull graphic on the underside, as well as the metallic trucks and black wheels.
description_view_1: This angled view emphasizes the concave shape of the deck, the side profile of the trucks, and the black wheels, with a partial glimpse of the skull graphic.
description_view_2: This view focuses on the top of the deck, showcasing the grip tape and the partial cut-out revealing the skull graphic near the tail.
description_view_3: This side view displays the thickness of the deck, the mounting of the trucks, and the black wheels, with the skull graphic partially visible.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The underside of the deck features a detailed, monochrome graphic of a stylized skull with swirling, ornamental patterns, rendered in shades of gray and white. The design is bold and occupies a significant portion of the deck, giving it a striking, urban look.
attribute_wheel_type: classic street wheels, black, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard metallic trucks, silver color, standard kingpin mounting, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black grip tape with a partial cut-out near the tail revealing the skull graphic underneath
